Place the official VB-CABLE package here before building the installer.

Supported layouts:
1) Extracted package with VBCABLE_Setup_x64.exe in this folder or a subfolder.
2) Original official ZIP package in this folder. VoiSee can extract it for manual install.

Recommended for installer checkbox:
- extract the official VB-CABLE ZIP here so VBCABLE_Setup_x64.exe is present before running scripts\build-installer.ps1

Do not place user-generated VoiSee data here.
